title: EngimaXplore2.0 2024
description:
EnigmaXplore will be a cyber security competition- Jeopardy Style,  for participants to show their skills in various areas of computing and solve real-life security challenges.

Guidelines:

It’s a 24 hr online live time event, having challenges from different categories like Reverse Engineering, Binary Exploitation, Forensics, Web Exploitation, cryptography etc.
Hosted on  CTFd  platform.
Each category would have at least 2-3 challenges of difficulty ranging from Easy to Hard level.
Problems will be visible at the start of the competition.
Teams of 1-3 members are allowed.
